chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Criminal Transfer Application No.D-06 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19-10-2022 Mr. Niaz Hussain Mirani Special Prosecutor NAB. This application has been moved by accused Muhammad Safar standing a trial in Reference No.14/2017 for its transfer from learned Accountability Court No.1, Hyderabad to any other Court at Hyderabad on the ground that same is lying vacant. Mr. Niaz Hussain Mirani Special Prosecutor NAB present in Court in some other matters has waived notice of this application and has given no objection. Accordingly, this application is allowed. Reference No.14/2017 is withdrawn from the file of learned Accountability Court No.1, Hyderabad and transferred to learned Accountability Court No.3 for disposal in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
